caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, over-ear headphones, and a dark green t-shirt sits in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio. His shirt features the white text "I CON NEVER DO SHIT NETWORK". He is positioned behind a professional black microphone. In the background, several framed photos hang on the wall, and a white male mannequin wearing a white garment stands near a clothing rack. A red logo with the text "BODILY" is visible in the lower right of the scene, and a circular logo is in the lower left. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking and shifting his facial expressions. He looks slightly to the side while talking, with his mouth open and then closing as his expression changes slightly between the frames.
